raw.subject: Your Mobile page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I saw your post about the last-minute opening for tomorrow morning and thought it was a great example of how you're always looking out for your customers. It's clear that you're committed to providing a convenient and flexible service.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential customers who prefer to plan ahead or need to book a specific time slot - like yours - missing out.

I sketched out a simple page idea based on the services and photos you share on Facebook, including a services overview and a photo gallery. I also included a contact section with your hours and a map to make it easy for customers to find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/t-c-s-hand-car-wash-mobile-detailing-mobile

I'd love to discuss how a simple website like this could help you reach more customers and streamline your operations. There's a flat fee for local businesses like yours, and I'd be happy to answer any questions you have or provide more details over a quick call. Please reply to this email or let me know a good time to talk.
